app.description: Accept card payments with Square. Connect your Square seller account with OAuth.

statusText.redirect_missing_app_id: Authorization response is missing the app id
statusText.redirect_missing_code: Authorization response is missing the authorization code
statusText.not_authorized: Square did not return the required tokens
statusText.no_locations: No Square locations were found for this account
statusText.missing_oauth_config: Square OAuth is not configured on the server
statusText.token_refresh_failed: Could not refresh the Square access token
statusText.payment_failed: Square could not process the payment
